input.body_text:
You're Invited!

Please join us for a baby shower brunch
honoring mom-to-be

AMANDA RODRIGUEZ

Sunday, March 15, 2026
11:00 AM - 2:00 PM

Hosted at Kelly's home
789 Maple Street
Austin, TX 78701

Light brunch will be served
Registry: Amazon & Target

RSVP to Kelly at kelly.martinez@yahoo.com
or (512) 555-8910 by March 8th

It's a BOY! 💙
